name: subbridge-cn
description: Free Netflix subtitle translator Chrome extension (JA/EN -> ZH)

scripts.start: echo 'Open chrome://extensions, enable Developer mode, click Load unpacked and select this folder.'
scripts.check: echo 'No build required for MVP. Validate in Chrome extension page.'
scripts.zip: mkdir -p dist && zip -r dist/subbridge-cn.zip manifest.json src docs README.md package.json
